title: LED Filament GLS Bulb, 7W ES, 2700K Warm White, Dimmable, 240V, Pack of 5
features: ENERGY EFFICIENT: 7W LED filament bulb provides excellent illumination while consuming minimal power, perfect for residential and commercial spaces
WARM AMBIANCE: 2700K warm white colour temperature creates a cosy and inviting atmosphere ideal for living spaces and bedrooms
VERSATILE COMPATIBILITY: Edison Screw (ES) base fitting and 240V rating make these bulbs suitable for most standard light fixtures
DIMMING CAPABILITY: Fully dimmable functionality allows you to adjust the light intensity to suit your mood and requirements
VALUE PACK: Set of 5 bulbs ensures you have replacements ready, offering long-term lighting solution for your space
description: Illuminate your space with these premium Heathfield LED filament GLS bulbs. This pack of five dimmable bulbs combines classic aesthetics with modern LED technology, each operating at 7 watts whilst providing warm white illumination at 2700K colour temperature. Perfect for creating a cosy ambiance in living rooms, bedrooms, or dining areas, these ES (Edison Screw) base bulbs operate on standard 240V power supply. The filament design offers a nostalgic appeal while delivering energy-efficient lighting that can be adjusted to suit your mood and needs. These bulbs are ideal for both residential and commercial applications where traditional-looking, dimmable LED lighting is desired. Each bulb in this convenient multi-pack ensures consistent warm lighting whilst maintaining the charm of traditional incandescent bulbs.
